name: pos-builder
description: POS-builder teaching skills for assembling a personal AI operating system.

interface.shortDescription: Guided POS-builder lessons for Claude and Codex learners.
interface.longDescription: Bundle of guided teaching skills that help a learner assemble a personal AI operating system step by step: diagnostic, storage, adapters, workflows, and course runtime setup.
defaultPrompt: Start the POS course with the diagnostic interview.
Set up one POS block such as vault, calendar, or goals.
Continue the learner's next POS step from saved state.
